allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe", "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe", "C:\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } else { Write-Output "missing: $p" } })
